    # Your code here

# Test

exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def compute_hessian(f, x, eps=1e-4):
    n = len(x)
    H = np.zeros((n, n))
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(n):
            x_pp = x.copy(); x_pp[i] += eps; x_pp[j] += eps
            x_pm = x.copy(); x_pm[i] += eps; x_pm[j] -= eps
            x_mp = x.copy(); x_mp[i] -= eps; x_mp[j] += eps
            x_mm = x.copy(); x_mm[i] -= eps; x_mm[j] -= eps
            H[i,j] = (f(x_pp) - f(x_pm) - f(x_mp) + f(x_mm)) / (4*eps**2)
    return H

def classify_point(hessian):
    eigs = np.linalg.eigvalsh(hessian)
    if np.all(eigs > 1e-10): return 'minimum'
    if np.all(eigs < -1e-10): return 'maximum'
    if np.any(eigs > 1e-10) and np.any(eigs < -1e-10): return 'saddle'
    return 'degenerate'

def f(x): return x[0]**2 + x[1]**2
H = compute_hessian(f, np.array([0.0, 0.0]))
print(f"Hessian:\n{H}")
print(f"Type: {classify_point(H)}")
hints: Use finite difference formula for second derivatives

exercises.title: Find Local Minima
exercises.description: Find all local minima of a multi-modal function.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np
from scipy.optimize import minimize

def find_all_minima(f, bounds, num_starts=20):
    """Find local minima via random restarts."""
    # Your code here
    pass

# Test: Rastrigin function (many local minima)
def rastrigin(x):
    return 10*len(x) + sum(xi**2 - 10*np.cos(2*np.pi*xi) for xi in x)

minima = find_all_minima(rastrigin, [(-5, 5), (-5, 5)])
print(f"Found {len(minima)} minima")
